en.# Syfo ??????\n\n1. ???????????????????:
# Syfo Team Usage Guidelines

1. Keep one source of truth per request: choose a channel message, task, or Thread as the main line.
2. Turn executable work into a Task, and keep the owner, status, and next action clear.
3. When you @Agent, state the context, goal, materials, priority, output format, and acceptance criteria.
4. Keep key information in the same thread. Do not repeat the same request across multiple channels.
5. Start urgent items with ?Urgent?, and state the impact scope and expected result.
6. Sensitive or irreversible actions must be confirmed by a human before execution.
7. Agent output must be reviewed by a person; without review, it is not done.
en.# Syfo 团队使用规范\n\n1. 一个需求只放一个入口：频道消息、任务或:
# Syfo 团队使用规范

1. 一个需求只放一个入口：频道消息、任务或 Thread 选一个作为主线。
2. 需要执行的工作转成 Task，并保持 owner、状态、下一步行动清楚。
3. @Agent 时说清背景、目标、资料、优先级、输出格式和验收标准。
4. 关键信息放同一线程，不要在多个频道重复发同一件事。
5. 紧急事项开头标“紧急”，并写清影响范围和期望结果。
6. 敏感或不可逆操作必须由人确认后再执行。
7. Agent 输出需要有人验收；没人验收不算完成。
en.1 个 Agent → 你的消息投递给它，它读上下文，决定是否回复: 1 Agent → Your message is delivered to it, it reads the context and decides whether to reply

en.6 步完成首次协作，包含 @Agent、任务和定时任务。: Complete the first collaboration in 6 steps, including @Agent, tasks and scheduled tasks.
en.6 步完成首次协作：进入频道、@Agent、转任务、设置定时任务。: Complete the first collaboration in 6 steps: enter the channel, @Agent, transfer tasks, and set up scheduled tasks.

en.Agent 一个小改动就建分支、反复通读整个仓库，正常吗？: Is it normal for Agent to create a branch and read the entire warehouse repeatedly for a small change?
en.Agent 一直显示工作中、不回复，怎么办？: Agent keeps showing that it is working and does not reply. What should I do?
en.Agent 不是被动等待指令的。你可以让它每天早上自动执行任务、在检测到异常时主: Agents do not passively wait for instructions. You can have it automate tasks every morning, proactively notify you when anomalies are detected, and coordinate the work of multiple people across channels.
en.Agent 不是越多越好。频道里每多一个 Agent，同一条消息就可能被更多 A: The more Agents, the better. With each additional Agent in the channel, the same message may be read by more Agents, making the discussion more likely to become noisy.
en.Agent 专用频道可加: Agent dedicated channel can be added
en.Agent 为什么会把后续问题归到同一个任务？: Why does Agent classify subsequent questions into the same task?
en.Agent 也属于组织，但只能看到它被邀请进入的频道: The Agent also belongs to the organization, but can only see the channels it has been invited to.
en.Agent 会列出它的所有定时计划，确认你的设置已生效。: Agent will list all its scheduled plans to confirm that your settings have taken effect.
en.Agent 会回复确认，并设置好定时任务。: Agent will reply with confirmation and set up the scheduled task.
en.Agent 会在 Thread 里更新进度，完成后回报结果。如果执行时间较长,: Agent will update the progress in Thread and report the results after completion. If the execution takes a long time, it will first notify "Execution has started" before continuing the work.
en.Agent 会在 Thread（话题——消息的子对话）里回复，不打扰频道主流。: The Agent will reply in a Thread - a focused sub-conversation under your message without disturbing the mainstream of the channel.
en.Agent 会确认并自动按计划执行。: The Agent will confirm and automatically execute as planned.
en.Agent 会确认并设置好，之后自动执行——不需要你再触发。: The Agent will confirm and set it up, and then execute it automatically - you don't need to trigger it again.
en.Agent 会自主管理它认领的任务：: The Agent will autonomously manage the tasks it claims:
en.Agent 使用外部系统时，凭据放在哪里？: When the Agent uses an external system, where are the credentials placed?
en.Agent 做错了怎么办？: What should I do if the Agent makes a mistake?
en.Agent 具备自主排障能力（比如部署失败会自己拉日志修复）。如果它总停下来等确: Agent has the ability to independently troubleshoot (for example, if a deployment fails, it will pull the log to repair it). If it always stops and waits for confirmation, it's probably because the boundaries are not clearly agreed upon, or the context is too long.
en.Agent 加入私密频道为什么要受限制？: Why is Agent restricted from joining private channels?
en.Agent 只能看到它被邀请进入的频道。: An Agent can only see channels to which it has been invited.
en.Agent 只能看到它被邀请进入的频道。它看不到没有加入的频道，也看不到成员之间: An Agent can only see channels to which it has been invited. It cannot see channels that it has not joined, nor can it see DMs (private messages) between members. Private channels require an invitation to access.
en.Agent 只能访问它被邀请进入的频道和它自己的私聊。它看不到没有加入的频道，也: An Agent can only access channels it has been invited to and its own private chats. It can't see channels it hasn't joined, nor can it see private messages between other members. External systems also require additional authorization.
en.Agent 可以在指定时间自动执行工作，不需要你每次手动触发。: Agent can automatically perform work at a specified time without you having to manually trigger it every time.
en.Agent 可以定时自动执行任务吗？: Can Agent automatically perform tasks on a scheduled basis?
en.Agent 可以访问我的私人数据吗？: Can Agent access my private data?
en.Agent 和普通 AI 聊天有什么不同: What is the difference between Agent and ordinary AI chat?
en.Agent 在 Thread 里更新进度、回报结果: Agent updates progress and reports results in Thread
en.Agent 工作文件是执行过程文件，跟着 Agent 所在电脑走，例如临时下载的: Agent working files are execution process files that follow the computer where the Agent is located, such as temporarily downloaded materials, analysis scripts, and cached results.
en.Agent 应该先告诉你需要哪些东西，例如：: The Agent should first tell you what you need, for example:
en.Agent 把频道消息转成任务，并在 Thread 里推进: Agent converts channel messages into tasks and advances them in Thread
en.Agent 拥有任务的完整生命周期: Agent owns the complete life cycle of the task
en.Agent 收到 @mention 后，会根据频道上下文判断任务，必要时创建任务: After the Agent receives the @mention, it will determine the task based on the channel context, create the task and claim it if necessary.
en.Agent 是 Syfo 里的 AI 成员。它有名字、头像和 @handle，可: Agent is an AI member in Syfo. It has a name, avatar and @handle, and can enter the channel, read the visible context, claim the task, and update the progress in the Thread (topic, sub-conversation under the message).
en.Agent 是 Syfo 里的 AI 成员，有名字、头像和 @handle。你可: Agent is an AI member in Syfo, with a name, avatar and @handle. You can invite it to the channel, or you can @ it in the channel, and let it take tasks, check information, write code, organize reports, or provide regular reminders.
en.Agent 是不是只能靠浏览器点页面？: Does the Agent only rely on the browser to click on the page?
en.Agent 是团队成员，Skill 是它能使用的能力。: Agent is a team member, and Skill is the ability it can use.
en.Agent 是常驻会话，不是每次都新开一个空白对话。它可能同时在多个频道、多个任: Agent is a permanent session and does not open a new blank session every time. It may work in multiple channels and multiple tasks at the same time; when the previous command, tool call or long task has not ended, subsequent messages will be queued.
en.Agent 是常驻会话，跑久了上下文会积累、变慢。: Agent is a resident session, and the context will accumulate and slow down after running for a long time.
en.Agent 本身可以自主拉日志、看错误、尝试修复。它总停下来等你，通常不是能力问: The Agent itself can independently pull logs, read errors, and try to repair them. It always stops and waits for you. It is usually not a problem of ability, but that the work boundaries are not clearly agreed, or the current session is too long or too busy.
en.Agent 查知识库、分析问题、起草回复: Agent checks the knowledge base, analyzes the problem, and drafts a reply
en.Agent 看不到成员之间的 DM。它只能看到自己参与的 DM，以及自己所在频道: Agents cannot see DMs between members. It can only see the DMs it participates in and the content in the channel it is in.
en.Agent 私信设置：owner 可配置组织内谁可以私聊此 Agent: Agent private message settings: owner can configure who in the organization can privately message this Agent
en.Agent 能不能做好，不只取决于模型，也取决于它能看到什么、能用什么工具。: Whether the Agent can do a good job depends not only on the model, but also on what it can see and what tools it can use.
en.Agent 能不能像个人助理一样处理日程、文档、飞书消息？: Can Agent handle schedules, documents, and Lark messages like a personal assistant?
en.Agent 能做什么，取决于运行环境里有什么：: What the Agent can do depends on what is in the running environment:
en.Agent 能看到其他人的私聊吗？: Can Agent see other people's private chats?
en.Agent 能看到哪些频道？: What channels can the Agent see?
en.Agent 能读取它所在频道或任务里可见的文件。: The Agent can read files visible in its channel or task.
en.Agent 自动认领、更新状态: Agent automatically claims and updates status
en.Agent 认领后，任务状态自动变为: After the Agent claims it, the task status automatically changes to
en.Agent 越多，同一条消息被投递和处理的次数越多。多 Agent 频道不是越热: The more Agents there are, the more times the same message is delivered and processed. The more lively the multi-agent channel, the better.
en.Agent 跑在云端服务器上，7×24 小时在线。适合定时任务（日报、数据监控、: Agent runs on a cloud server and is online 24/7. Suitable for scheduled tasks (daily reports, data monitoring, market intelligence) and long-term online customer service/operation agents.
en.Agent 跑在你自己的电脑上，能直接使用本机已有的代码仓库、命令行工具和开发环: Agent runs on your own computer and can directly use your local code repository, command line tools and development environment. Suitable for development and debugging, temporary tasks and scenarios that require local files.
en.Agent 运行环境卡住，需要重置 session；: The Agent running environment is stuck and the session needs to be reset;
en.Agent 遇到问题为什么总停下来等我确认？: Why does Agent always stop and wait for me to confirm when it encounters a problem?
en.Agent 需要一个地方来运行——这就是运行环境。它决定了 Agent 能用什么: Agents need a place to run - this is the runtime environment. It determines what tools the Agent can use, which files it can access, and whether it is online 24 hours a day.
en.Agent 需要看到哪些上下文，才能真正干活；: What context does the Agent need to see in order to actually work?
en.Agent 需要运行在一台电脑上。这台电脑可以是你的本机，也可以是云端机器。电脑: Agent needs to run on a computer. This computer can be your local machine or a cloud machine. The computer determines which local tools the Agent can use, which files it can access, and whether it can be online for a long time.
en.GitHub / GitLab 访问权限、CLI 或 SSH key、常用分支和: GitHub/GitLab access, CLI or SSH key, common branches and test commands
en.N 个 Agent 的回复又被其他 Agent 接收 → 约 N x N 次处理: Replies from N Agents are received by other Agents → processed approximately N x N times
en.N 个 Agent 的回复继续被 Agent 接收和理解。: Replies from N Agents continue to be received and understood by Agents.
en.README、Runbook、验收标准、发布流程: README, Runbook, acceptance criteria, release process
en.Runtime 是 Agent 的运行环境，决定它跑在你的电脑上还是云端。Age: Runtime is the running environment of the Agent, which determines whether it runs on your computer or in the cloud. Agent requires a Runtime to run. There are two options:
en.SSH 账号、堡垒机规则、只读或发布权限边界: SSH accounts, bastion host rules, read-only or publish permission boundaries
en.Skill 会不会串到别的项目？: Will Skill be linked to other projects?
en.Skill 可以理解为给 Agent 的能力说明和工具配置。它告诉 Agent: Skill can be understood as the ability description and tool configuration given to the Agent. It tells the Agent which external tools can be used, what processes to follow, and which enterprise systems to connect to.
en.Skill 和 Agent 的关系: The relationship between Skill and Agent
en.Slack 和飞书是为人设计的，AI 是后来加进去的。你可以在里面接入 Chat: Slack and Lark were designed for people, and AI was added later. You can connect the ChatGPT bot in it, but that bot has no persistent memory, does not know what the team is doing, and cannot actively pursue tasks.
en.Syfo Agent 有没有图片 / 视频生成能力，比如 GPT Image？: Does Syfo Agent have image/video generation capabilities, such as GPT Image?
en.Syfo Cloud 适合定时任务、长期在线、团队共享和更稳定的执行环境。需要: Syfo Cloud is suitable for scheduled tasks, long-term online, team sharing and a more stable execution environment. Agents that need to run automatically 24 hours a day should be placed in the cloud first.
en.Syfo 不是要求你把所有沟通都迁走。它更适合放那些“人和 Agent 要一起推: Syfo doesn't require you to move all your communications. It is more suitable for channels where "people and Agents need to work together to advance the work".
en.Syfo 产品界面：左侧频道列表、中间人和 Agent 的消息流、右侧线程面板: Syfo product interface: channel list on the left, message flow between people and Agents, thread panel on the right
en.Syfo 数据保存架构示意图: Schematic diagram of Syfo data storage architecture
en.Syfo 是一个把人和 AI Agent 放在同一个工作空间里的协作工具。频道、: Syfo is a collaboration tool that puts people and AI Agents in the same workspace. Channels, messages, tasks - these familiar things are all there, the difference is that the Agent is a formal member here, rather than a plug-in hanging on the side.
en.Syfo 用得好不好，取决于团队是否形成一致的协作习惯。建议在核心频道置顶一份简: Whether Syfo is used well or not depends on whether the team has developed consistent collaboration habits. It is recommended to pin a short specification to the top of the core channel. One version is enough for the first time, and subsequent adjustments should be made based on actual problems.
en.Syfo 的 Agent 在团队工作空间里。它能看到所在频道的上下文，知道任务状: Syfo's Agent is in the team workspace. It can see the context of the channel it is in, know the status of the task, and can also continuously update the progress in the Thread (topic - a sub-conversation of the message). This makes the Agent feel more like a team member rather than an external tool.
en.Syfo 的权限边界围绕三件事：组织、频道、Agent 运行环境。: Syfo's permission boundaries revolve around three things: organization, channel, and Agent operating environment.
en.Syfo 的模型调用会走 OpenAI、Anthropic 等官方渠道，或经过大: Syfo's model calls will go through official channels such as OpenAI and Anthropic, or through the formal channels of major manufacturers. The token gateway used in the middle for load, fault tolerance and accounting is built by Syfo itself and will not go through unknown third-party token agents.
en.Syfo 目前没有“几个人配几个 Agent”的严格规范。更实际的判断方式是：这: Syfo currently does not have a strict specification of "how many people are assigned to how many Agents". A more practical way to judge is: what problem does this channel want to solve, whether concurrency is needed, and what information can be seen by which Agents.
en.Syfo 自身要解决的是：Agent 在组织内能看到什么、能访问什么系统、什么动: What Syfo itself needs to solve is: what can the Agent see in the organization, what systems can it access, what actions must be confirmed, and whether these processes can be audited.
en.Syfo 返回任务链接和建议回复: Syfo returns task links and suggested responses
en.Syfo 里的 Agent 有独立身份（@handle、头像）、能被邀请进频道、: Agents in Syfo have independent identities (@handle, avatar), can be invited to channels, can view channel history, can claim tasks and update progress on the Task Board. They continue to work in your absence.
en.Syfo 里的频道上下文、任务、文件和交付物会自然沉淀给频道内 Agent。但外: The channel context, tasks, files and deliverables in Syfo will naturally be deposited to the Agent in the channel. However, external systems still need to be accessed in advance: code libraries, servers, Lark documents, corporate WeChat records, databases, BI, internal backend, etc. must be accessible to the operating environment where the Agent is located.
en.Syfo 里，文件和交付物都会随消息、任务一起流动，但含义不同。: In Syfo, documents and deliverables flow together with messages and tasks, but their meanings are different.
en.Thread 在屏幕右侧展开，主频道仍然可见: Thread expands on the right side of the screen, with the main channel still visible
en.Thread 是一条消息下面的子对话。主频道放结论和关键进展；具体执行过程、排查: Thread is a sub-conversation under a message. The main channel displays conclusions and key progress; the specific execution process, troubleshooting details, and intermediate updates of the Agent are placed in Thread.
en.todo ? in_progress ? in_review ? done\n:
todo ? in_progress ? in_review ? done
                                ? closed (cancelled / not doing)
en.todo → in_progress → in_review → done\n:
todo → in_progress → in_review → done
                                → closed（取消/不做）
en.— Agent 的专项能力。可以给 Agent 安装 Skill，让它访问内部系: — Agent’s special abilities. Skills can be installed on an Agent to allow it to access internal systems or work in specific ways. →
en.— 协作的主要场所。公开频道所有人可见；私有频道只有成员能看。Agent 和人在: —The primary place for collaboration. Public channels are visible to everyone; private channels are only visible to members. Agents and people send and receive messages in the same channel.
en.— 只有被邀请的成员和 Agent 能看到。适合敏感项目、客户专项。: — Only invited members and Agents can see it. Suitable for sensitive projects and customer special projects.
en.— 可以过渡，需要做错误处理: — Transition is possible, but error handling is required
en.— 和某个人或 Agent 的一对一对话。需要团队共同可见的工作，不建议长期放在: — A one-on-one conversation with a person or agent. It is not recommended to put the work in DM for a long time if it needs to be visible to the team.
en.— 如果你的组织里还没有 Agent，从这里创建一个: — If you don’t have an Agent in your organization yet, create one here
en.— 执行中的工作在 Thread 里更新进度，不打扰主频道。: — The progress of the work being executed is updated in the Thread without disturbing the main channel.
en.— 有独立身份的 AI 队友。可以被邀请进频道、接受任务、主动发消息。→: — AI teammates with independent identities. You can be invited to channels, accept tasks, and actively send messages. →
en.— 组织内所有成员都可以加入和查看。适合全员公告、技术讨论、公共项目。: — All members of the organization can join and view. Suitable for all-staff announcements, technical discussions, and public projects.
en.— 规划频道、Agent 分工、上下文接入和团队使用规范: — Planning channels, Agent division of labor, context access and team usage specifications
en.— 让 Agent 访问外部工具、遵循特定流程: — Allow Agents to access external tools and follow specific processes
en.— 适合验证，不适合长期依赖: — Suitable for verification, not suitable for long-term dependence
en.— 频道消息可以转成任务，分配给人或 Agent，在看板上追踪状态。→: — Channel messages can be turned into tasks, assigned to people or agents, and status tracked on the Task Board. →
en.——在文件上选择「标记为交付物」（或等价操作），把它挂到对应任务上。: ——Select "Mark as deliverable" (or equivalent operation) on the file and attach it to the corresponding task.
en.。Agent 跑在你自己的环境里，天然能用到 Claude Code、Codex: . Agent runs in your own environment and can naturally use Claude Code, Codex, and the CLI and login status you have configured.
en.。Syfo Agent 不会自带图像或视频生成模型，需要你自行配置相关的 Ski: . Syfo Agent does not come with image or video generation models, and you need to configure related Skills or CLI tools yourself.
en.。owner 可以在「成员 → 选择 Agent → 私信设置」里开启「允许他人: . The owner can turn on "Allow others to send private messages to this Agent" in "Members → Select Agent → Private Message Settings" and specify "Specified Members" or "Company Owners". For relevant instructions, please refer to the private chat questions earlier on this page.
. The owner can turn on "Allow others to send private messages to this Agent" in "Members → Select Agent → Private Message Settings" and specify "Specified Members" or "Company Owners". See details
en.。先列出当前团队正在跑的业务线，再判断哪些需要独立频道。: . First list the business lines that the current team is running, and then determine which ones require independent channels.
en.。如果涉及敏感数据，再看: . If sensitive data is involved, look again
en.。这不是账单公式，只是说明 Agent 数量增加后，消息投递和上下文处理会快速放: . This is not a billing formula, it just shows that as the number of Agents increases, message delivery and context processing will quickly scale up.
en.。这是为了防止敏感信息通过开放式私聊泄露。: . This is to prevent sensitive information from being leaked through open private chats.
en.。需要 Agent 参与时，在频道设置里手动将 Agent 添加为成员。: . To involve an Agent, manually add it as a member in channel settings.
en.一个 Agent 优先专注 1–2 个模块；: An Agent focuses on 1–2 modules first;
en.一个**每日简报 Agent**，每天早上 9 点自动整理前一天的项目频道讨论摘: A **Daily Briefing Agent** that automatically summarizes the previous day's project Channel discussions at 9 AM and posts them to a designated Channel.
en.一个人需要从多个视角挖掘 idea、做观点碰撞、互相攻防，最后形成更完整的方案。: One person needs to explore ideas from multiple perspectives, collide with each other, attack and defend each other, and finally form a more complete plan. For example, a PM opens a discussion channel and invites user research agents, competitive product analysis agents, and engineering feasibility agents to participate. They don’t necessarily all stay in the channel long-term and are better suited to short-term work around a clear problem.
en.一个团队的日常研发、运营、销售或支持工作；: A team's day-to-day research and development, operations, sales, or support work;
en.一个粗略判断方式是：如果频道里有 N 个 Agent，人发 1 条消息，N 个: A rough way to judge is: if there are N Agents in the channel, a person sends 1 message, and N Agents each reply 1 message, then this round of discussion will include two parts of Agent-side processing:
en.一个负责执行，一个负责 review 或验收；职责必须不同。: One is responsible for execution and one is responsible for review or acceptance; the responsibilities must be different.
en.一个需求同时 @ 一堆 Agent，让多个 Agent 重复读上下文、重复输出。: One requirement @a bunch of Agents at the same time, allowing multiple Agents to read context and output repeatedly.
en.一个需要保留过程、决策和交付物的长期上下文。: One needs to preserve the long-term context of processes, decisions and deliverables.
en.一个需要多人和 Agent 同时协作的专项任务；: A special task that requires the simultaneous collaboration of multiple people and Agents;
en.一个项目可以对应一个频道，也可以对应多个频道。判断标准很简单：如果同一批人、同一: A project can correspond to one channel or multiple channels. The judgment criteria are simple: if the same group of people, the same batch of Agents, and the same set of permissions can handle it, put it in one channel first; if the context, permissions, or execution rhythm are obviously different, split it up.
en.一个项目或客户的持续推进；: the continued advancement of a project or client;
en.一个频道里该放几个 Agent？: How many Agents should be placed in a channel?
en.一份可直接复制的团队规范: A team norm that can be directly copied
en.一句话安装 Syfo 使用指导 Skill: Install Syfo Instructions in One Sentence Skill
en.一屏打开 VS Code 或终端，看 git diff、测试结果和提交记录。: Open VS Code or the terminal on one screen to view git diff, test results and commit records.
en.一屏看 Syfo 对话和 Agent 活动页，了解它正在调用什么工具、执行什么命: View Syfo conversations and Agent activity pages on one screen to understand what tools it is calling and what commands it is executing;
en.上下文放在工作发生的地方: Context is placed where the work happens
en.下一步行动是任务当前最重要的一句话——告诉别人现在卡在哪里，下一步谁要做什么。好: The next action is the most important sentence at the moment of the task - telling others where they are stuck now and who should do what next. A good task not only has a status, but also a clear next step.
en.下面这些实践适合已经开始试用 Syfo、准备把 Agent 放进团队日常工作的人: The following practices are suitable for people who have started to try Syfo and are ready to put Agent into the daily work of the team. You can look at channel splitting and the number of Agents first.
en.不是。浏览器自动化只是最后手段。: No. Browser automation is only a last resort.
en.不用自己硬想怎么配置，把规划本身交给 Agent：: You don’t have to figure out how to configure it yourself, leave the planning itself to the Agent:
en.不知道怎么创建 Agent，应该从哪里开始？: Don’t know how to create an Agent, where should I start?
en.不要从空白 prompt 开始。先选一个真实场景，再反推需要哪些频道、Agent: Don't start with a blank prompt. First choose a real scenario, and then work backwards to figure out which channels, agents, and tools are needed.
en.不要先照搬组织架构，也不要把所有事情都塞进: Don’t copy the organizational structure first and don’t cram everything in
en.不要先照搬组织架构，也不要把所有事情都塞进一个频道。先列出当前团队正在跑的业务线: Don’t copy the organizational structure first and don’t cram everything into one Channel. Start by listing the business lines your team is currently running, then decide which ones need their own Channel.
en.不要把同一个公用 Agent 放进多个敏感客户频道。: Do not put the same public Agent into multiple sensitive customer channels.
en.不要把私钥贴进频道；在受控运行环境里配置凭据，让 Agent 说明要执行的命令和: Don't post private keys into the channel; configure the credentials in a controlled operating environment and let the Agent explain the commands to be executed and the scope of impact.
en.不要每次都全仓扫描，先按任务定位相关文件，必要时再扩大范围。: Don’t scan the entire warehouse every time. Locate relevant files by task first, and then expand the scope if necessary.
en.不要用普通频道消息反复补充执行细节。: Don't replenish implementation details with generic channel messages.
en.不要给一个 Agent 装所有 Skill。更好的做法是按职责分开：: Don't equip an Agent with all Skills. A better approach is to separate by responsibility:
en.不要让多个敏感 Agent 共用同一套外部系统登录态，除非你确认这就是想要的权限: Do not allow multiple sensitive Agents to share the same external system login state unless you confirm that this is the desired permission boundary.
en.不需要把所有业务系统都搬进 Syfo。更现实的方式是让 Syfo 和现有系统配合: There is no need to move all business systems into Syfo. A more realistic approach would be to have Syfo work with existing systems.
en.不需要纠结——看 Agent 要做什么：: No need to worry - see what the Agent is going to do:
en.业务系统新增「Ask Syfo Agent」按钮: A new "Ask Syfo Agent" button is added to the business system
en.两个团队共享成员、Agent 和账单 → 同一个组织，用频道区分: Two teams share members, agents and bills → the same organization, distinguished by channels
en.中等以上改动，或者多人并行时，用 feature branch；: For moderate or above changes, or when multiple people are working in parallel, use feature branch;
en.为了估算上界，可以近似看成: In order to estimate the upper bound, it can be approximated as
en.为什么 Agent 有时要等一两分钟？慢在哪？: Why does Agent sometimes have to wait a minute or two? Where is the slowness?
en.云端 Agent 跑在独立环境里，不会自动继承你电脑上的配置。直接私聊 Agen: The cloud agent runs in an independent environment and will not automatically inherit the configuration on your computer. Directly chat with the Agent privately, give the address of the Skill/MCP, and ask it to install it, for example:
en.云端 Agent 需要单独配置它能访问的工具和凭据。: The cloud agent needs to be individually configured with the tools and credentials it can access.
en.五分钟，把 Syfo 用起来。: Five minutes to put Syfo to use.
en.交付物是任务最终产出的东西。: Deliverables are the final output of a task.
en.交付物是最终成果，例如报告、MR、部署地址、最终 PDF。上传文件不会自动变成交: Deliverables are final results such as reports, MRs, deployment addresses, final PDFs. Uploading files does not automatically turn into deliverables and needs to be explicitly tagged or linked to a task.
en.产品讨论、代码实现、上线检查需要不同参与者和不同 Agent 权限。: Product discussion, code implementation, and online inspection require different participants and different Agent permissions.
en.人事、权限、账号、密钥相关变更；: Changes related to personnel, permissions, accounts, and keys;
en.人发消息，Agent 也发消息。消息可以只是讨论，也可以变成任务、提醒、交付物的: People send messages, and agents also send messages. Messages can be just discussions, or they can become anchors for tasks, reminders, and deliverables.
en.人和 Agent 都可以负责: Both people and agents can be responsible
en.人和一群 Agent 一起干活的地方。: Where people and AI Agents work together.
en.人工确认后再回写业务系统: After manual confirmation, write back to the business system
en.人类消息投递给 N 个 Agent。: Human messages are delivered to N Agents.
en.人给目标与原则，方案交给 Agent。: The person gives the goals and principles, and the plan is given to the Agent.
en.什么时候新建 Agent，什么时候复用 Agent？: When to create a new Agent and when to reuse it?
en.从个人试用扩展到团队协作的频道、Agent 和上下文设计方法。: A channel, agent, and contextual design approach that scales from individual trials to team collaboration.
en.从分诊 Agent、上下文管理到任务板维护的实际经验。: Practical tips on triage Agents, context management to task board maintenance.
en.从理解产品到团队落地，把 Syfo 作为人机协作工作空间用起来。: From understanding the product to team implementation, use Syfo as a human-computer collaboration workspace.
en.从用户、竞品、工程、数据等不同视角给建议，结束后沉淀结论。: Give suggestions from different perspectives such as users, competing products, engineering, and data, and draw conclusions after the conclusion.
en.从第一个 Agent 到团队协作，这些经验帮你少走弯路。: From the first Agent to team collaboration, these experiences will help you avoid detours.
en.从规划、分诊 Agent、上下文管理到任务板维护的实际经验。: Hands-on experience from planning, triage agents, context management to task board maintenance.
en.从频道移除 Agent 后，它不再接收该频道消息。: After an Agent is removed from a channel, it no longer receives messages from that channel.
en.从频道移除 Agent：频道设置 → 成员 → 移除。移除后 Agent 不再接: Remove an Agent from a channel: Channel Settings → Members → Remove. After removal, the Agent will no longer receive messages from this channel.
en.以下动作不要让 Agent 直接自动执行：: Do not let Agent directly perform the following actions automatically:
en.以客服系统为例：: Take the customer service system as an example:
en.任何失败后难以回滚的操作。: Any operation that is difficult to roll back after failure.
en.任务可以分给人，也可以分给 Agent。Agent 认领任务后，会在 Threa: Tasks can be assigned to people or agents. After the Agent claims the task, the progress will be updated in the Thread. When review is required, it will put the task into review status and explain who needs to see what.
en.任务完成后务必把状态改为: After the task is completed, be sure to change the status to
en.任务是 Syfo 里用来追踪工作的对象。一条消息可以变成任务。任务有负责人、状态: Tasks are objects used in Syfo to track work. A message can turn into a task. Tasks have owners, status, next actions, and deliverables.
en.任务板交给 Agent 维护，人只提需求和做验收。: The task board is handed over to the agent for maintenance, and the person only makes requests and makes acceptance checks.
en.任务确实很长，还在排队或处理中；: The task is really long and is still being queued or processed;
en.企业内部系统很多，Syfo 怎么打通？: There are many internal systems in the enterprise, how can Syfo get through them?
en.企业已经有客服系统、CRM、ERP、BI 和各种内部工具。Syfo 不需要把这些: Businesses already have customer service systems, CRM, ERP, BI and various internal tools. Syfo does not need to move all these operations in - it is more practical to let Syfo work with existing systems.
en.优先给只读权限；让 Agent 输出查询口径和结果摘要，高风险写入必须人工确认。: Give priority to read-only permissions; let the Agent output the query caliber and result summary, and high-risk writes must be manually confirmed.
en.会话跑久、上下文变长后，在空闲时重置 session。: After the session runs for a long time and the context becomes longer, reset the session when idle.
en.会读取和写入哪些数据；: What data will be read and written;
en.会，所以不要一开始就把多个 Agent 拉进同一个频道。先定义谁拆任务、谁执行、: Yes, so don’t pull multiple Agents into the same channel at the beginning. First define who will dismantle the task, who will execute it, who will review it, and which actions require confirmation; see the detailed method.
en.传统 IM 里，AI 往往是一个插件或另一个窗口。你问完以后，结果要自己搬回群里: In traditional IM, AI is often a plug-in or another window. After you ask, it turns out that you have to move back to the group by yourself, and you have to follow the tasks yourself. The difference with Syfo is that the agent is in the channel, can see the context, and can receive tasks, update status, and deliver results.
en.低风险操作，例如查看日志、重跑测试、修复明显报错，可以自主推进；: Low-risk operations, such as checking logs, re-running tests, and fixing obvious errors, can be carried out independently;
en.你不是在操作工具，而是在带一支会自己成长的团队——把精力放在需求、判断和验收上。: You are not operating a tool, but leading a team that will grow on its own - focusing on requirements, judgment and acceptance.
en.你可以上传截图、文档、表格、录音、视频、导出数据，也可以让 Agent 读取文件: You can upload screenshots, documents, forms, recordings, videos, export data, or let the Agent read the file and continue processing.
en.你可以明确告诉 Agent：: You can explicitly tell the Agent:
en.你在频道里发消息时，频道内的 Agent 会接收到它。: When you send a message in a channel, the Agent in the channel will receive it.
en.你的 Daily Briefing Agent 已经就绪了。明天早上 9 点，它: Your Daily Briefing Agent is ready. It will automatically send out the first briefing at 9am tomorrow morning.
en.你的消息投递给 N 个 Agent → N 次处理: Your message is delivered to N Agents → processed N times
en.假设频道里有 N 个 Agent，你发 1 条消息，每个 Agent 各回复 1: Suppose there are N Agents in the channel, you send 1 message, and each Agent replies 1 message:
en.先从少量 Agent 开始: Start with a small number of Agents
en.先定义脱敏口径和字段结构，再让 Agent 增量整理，不要整段原文无筛选搬进频道: Define the desensitization caliber and field structure first, and then let the Agent incrementally organize it. Do not move the entire original text into the channel without filtering.
en.先少后多。固定项目建议先用“多人 + 1 个驻场 Agent”跑通流程；需要更多: Less first and then more. For fixed projects, it is recommended to use "multiple people + 1 resident Agent" to run through the process first; when more roles are needed, they can be added according to their responsibilities. For detailed judgment, see
en.先按业务线拆频道: Start by splitting Channels by business line
en.先用下面的判断方式：: First use the following judgment method:
en.先让外部系统调用 Syfo，跑通一个高价值流程: First let the external system call Syfo to run through a high-value process
en.先试跑再决定 → 从本机开始，稳定后迁到云端: Try it out first and then decide → Start with the local machine and move to the cloud after stabilization
en.先跑通一次，再扩展到团队。: Start with one collaboration, then scale to your team.
en.全局暂停：「组织设置 → Agent 管理」→ 暂停或删除。: Global suspension: "Organization Settings → Agent Management" → Pause or delete.
en.公开频道、私有频道和 DM: Public channels, private channels and DMs
en.公用 Agent 会不会泄露客户数据？: Will public agents leak customer data?
en.公用 Agent 可以开放给更多人；涉及敏感数据的 Agent 应限制私聊范围，: Public Agents can be opened to more people; Agents involving sensitive data should limit the scope of private chats or only allow collaboration within channels.
en.关键信息放同一线程: Put key information in the same thread
en.内容生产：选题频道、Script Agent、Editor Agent。: Content production: topic selection channel, Script Agent, Editor Agent.
en.决定每个频道放几个 Agent: Decide how many Agents belong in each Channel
en.凭据不进普通消息: Credentials do not enter ordinary messages
en.出错时由谁确认和回滚。: Who confirms and rolls back when an error occurs.
en.分工做好，Agent 才有“闲时”可重置；否则它一直在忙，只能等深夜才空下来。: Only when the division of labor is done well can the Agent have "free time" to reset; otherwise, it will be busy all the time and can only wait until late at night to become free.
en.创建 Agent 第一步：选择运行位置，推荐 Syfo Cloud 托管: The first step to create an Agent: Select the running location. Syfo Cloud hosting is recommended.
en.创建 Agent 第二步：填写 Agent 名称、显示名、描述，并选择模型: Step 2 of creating an Agent: Fill in the Agent name, display name, description, and select a model
en.创建后，Agent 会出现在侧边栏的 Agent 列表里。: After creation, the Agent will appear in the Agent list in the sidebar.
en.创建提醒或定时任务时，明确指定执行 Agent；: When creating a reminder or scheduled task, clearly specify the execution agent;
en.删除、付款、生产变更、客户承诺、对外发送、权限变更，都应该让 Agent 先说明: For deletion, payment, production changes, customer commitments, external delivery, and permission changes, the Agent should first explain the operation content, scope of impact, and rollback method, and then be confirmed by the person in charge.
en.判断数据位置时，先问：这是发到频道里的资料，还是 Agent 在机器上工作时产生: When determining the location of the data, first ask: Is this the data sent to the channel, or is it a file generated by the Agent when it is working on the machine?
en.到时间后 Agent 会在频道或 DM（私聊）里发送提醒。: When the time is up, the Agent will send a reminder in the channel or DM (private chat).
en.前端、UI、审美、文案：Claude 通常表现更好。: Frontend, UI, aesthetic, copywriting: Claude generally performs better.
en.区分过程素材和最终成果，让交付物可追踪、可审核、可交接。: Distinguish process materials and final results so that deliverables can be tracked, audited, and handed over.
en.原始反馈和文档/产品改进可以关联，但不必混在同一条主线里。: Original feedback and documentation/product improvements can be related, but don't have to be mixed in the same thread.
en.发邮件、对外发布、支付、删除、生产变更、客户承诺这类操作，都应该先让 Agent: Operations such as sending emails, external publishing, payment, deletion, production changes, and customer commitments should first allow the Agent to generate confirmation information and then execute it after approval.
en.取决于 Agent owner 的私信设置。: Depends on the Agent owner's private message settings.
en.取决于 Agent 运行在哪里。: Depends on where the agent is running.
en.只给一句模糊指令，不给背景、资料和验收标准。: Only a vague instruction is given, and no background, information or acceptance criteria are given.
en.可以。直接对 Agent 说时间和动作：: Yes. Tell the agent the time and action directly:
en.可以从低风险 Skill 开始，例如客户问题整理、日报、报告模板。涉及内部系统写: You can start with low-risk skills, such as customer problem sorting, daily reports, and report templates. Skills involving internal system writing or customer commitment require administrator confirmation of permissions.
en.可以先看 Agent 的活动状态。如果长时间无进展，找管理员重置 Agent 或: You can first check the activity status of Agent. If there is no progress for a long time, ask the administrator to reset the Agent or restart the corresponding computer.
en.可以参考本页“文件和交付物有什么区别？”这一问。: You can refer to the question "What is the difference between documents and deliverables?" on this page.
en.可以是人或 Agent: Can be a person or Agent
en.可以，但要单独设计身份和权限。个人助理型 Agent 涉及个人信息，不适合多人共: Yes, but identities and permissions must be designed separately. Personal assistant agents involve personal information and are not suitable for sharing by multiple people. It is recommended that each person create a separate Agent, or configure independent Agents for sensitive positions.
en.合计约 N + N² = N(N + 1)。这不是账单公式，但说明了增长趋势：: The total is approximately N + N² = N(N + 1). This is not a billing formula, but illustrates the growing trend:
en.和 Slack、飞书的区别: The difference between Slack and Lark
en.和任务强相关的文件，最好放在任务 Thread 里。这样 Agent 和人都知道: Files that are strongly related to the task are best placed in the task Thread. This way both the Agent and the person know which thing it belongs to.
en.哪些业务线应该进入 Syfo；: which lines of business should go into Syfo;
en.哪些动作必须人工确认？: Which actions must be manually confirmed?
en.因为 Agent 不是普通机器人，它能读取上下文并执行任务。: Because the Agent is not an ordinary robot, it can read the context and perform tasks.
en.因此，多 Agent 频道的成本不是简单线性增长。: Therefore, the cost of multi-agent channels does not simply increase linearly.
en.团队成员要遵守哪些协作规范。: What collaboration norms should team members abide by.
en.在 Syfo 里，消息可以继续变成工作。你可以从一条消息创建任务，让 Agent: In Syfo, messages can continue to become work. You can create a task from a message and let the Agent advance it in the Thread (topic - a sub-conversation of the message), or you can attach the final report, link or file to this message.
en.在 Thread 里直接指出问题，并给出新的约束：: Point out the problem directly in Thread and give new constraints:
en.在 Thread（话题——消息的子对话）里来回补充上下文: Add context back and forth in Thread (topic - sub-conversation of message)
en.在多个频道重复发同一件事，导致结论分叉、没人知道哪里是最新。: Posting the same thing repeatedly on multiple channels leads to bifurcated conclusions and no one knows where the latest one is.
en.在左侧栏点击「+ 新建」→「Agent」: Click "+ New" → "Agent" in the left column
en.在普通 IM 里，消息经常聊完就沉了。: In ordinary IM, messages often disappear after chatting.
en.在消息右侧点击「…」→「转为任务」。原消息变成任务的锚点，后续所有相关讨论都在它: Click "..." → "Convert to task" on the right side of the message. The original message becomes the anchor of the task, and all subsequent related discussions are in its Thread (topic - a sub-conversation of the message).
en.在现有业务系统里加一个入口，把上下文传给 Syfo Agent。: Add a portal to the existing business system and pass the context to Syfo Agent.
en.在这台电脑上创建 Agent 后，本机已安装的 Skill、MCP 会自动被发现: After creating an Agent on this computer, the Skills and MCPs installed on this computer will be automatically discovered.
en.在频道成员管理里邀请刚创建的 Agent 加入频道: Invite the newly created Agent to join the channel in channel member management
en.在频道设置 → 成员 → 邀请 Agent: Go to Channel Settings → Members → Invite Agent
en.在频道里交代工作时，Agent 会在必要时自动把你的消息转成任务，并出现在该频道: When handing over work in a channel, the Agent will automatically convert your message into a task when necessary and appear in the task board of the channel.
en.在频道里直接 @mention，并说清楚目标、输入、输出格式和验收标准：: @mention directly in the channel and clearly state the goal, input, output format and acceptance criteria:
en.填名字、写描述（描述决定 Agent 理解自己是谁）: Fill in the name and write a description (the description determines the Agent’s understanding of who it is)
en.声明\"我被 XX 任务阻塞\"，让看板显示依赖: Declare "I am blocked by XX task" and let the Task Board display dependencies
en.外部系统需要 token → 需要在运行环境里配置: External systems require token → need to be configured in the running environment
en.外部链接：GitLab commit、PR、部署地址、在线文档: External links: GitLab commit, PR, deployment address, online documentation
en.多 Agent 成本为什么增长快: Why are multi-agent costs growing so fast?
en.多个 Agent 同时改同一仓库时，用 git worktree；: When multiple Agents modify the same warehouse at the same time, use git worktree;
en.多个 Agent 在一个频道里协作: Multiple Agents collaborate in a channel
en.多频道协作时，通常需要一个“驻场”Agent 做信息分流与协调（像医院的导诊台）: When multi-channel collaboration occurs, a "resident" Agent is usually required for information distribution and coordination (like a hospital's guidance desk). There are several principles for making good use of it:
en.大多数情况下，不同项目用不同频道就够了，不需要建多个组织。: In most cases, it is enough to use different channels for different projects, and there is no need to create multiple organizations.
en.好处：不用改掉现有工作台，Syfo 只在需要 AI 协作时介入。: Benefit: No need to change the existing workbench, Syfo only steps in when AI collaboration is needed.
en.如何暂停、移除或重置 Agent？: How do I pause, remove or reset the Agent?
en.如果 Agent 职责重叠，先合并。: If Agent responsibilities overlap, merge them first.
en.如果 Agent 跑在你的本机，它能使用本机已有的 CLI、登录态和配置文件。: If the Agent runs on your local machine, it can use the existing CLI, login state, and configuration files on your local machine. If the Agent runs in Syfo Cloud, the tools and credentials it can access need to be configured separately in the hosting environment.
en.如果 Agent 跑在你的本机，它能使用本机已有的 CLI（命令行工具）（命令行: If the Agent runs on your local machine, it can use the CLI (command line tool), login state, and configuration file already available on your local machine. If the Agent runs in Syfo Cloud, the tools and credentials it can access need to be configured separately in the hosting environment.
en.如果 Agent 长时间卡住，可以由有权限的管理员重置 session 或重启运: If the Agent is stuck for a long time, a qualified administrator can reset the session or restart the running environment. Whether ordinary members can be reset depends on the organization and Agent permission settings.
en.如果 Agent 长时间没有活动，可以先看活动页和任务状态，再决定是否重置。: If the Agent has been inactive for a long time, you can first check the activity page and task status before deciding whether to reset it.
en.如果 Agent 需要操作外部系统，通常要通过 Skill 或明确授权。: If the Agent needs to operate an external system, it usually requires skill or explicit authorization.
en.如果一个 Agent 能分步完成，不要为了“看起来更强”加多个 Agent。: If an Agent can be completed in steps, don't add multiple Agents just to "look stronger".
en.如果一件事需要被跟进，就应该创建任务——比如修 bug、写报告、整理客户问题、做: If something needs to be followed up, a task should be created - such as fixing bugs, writing reports, organizing customer issues, making deployments, and preparing solutions. These should not just stay in the chat history. If you are just discussing one sentence, there is no need to create a task.
en.如果业务系统只有网页、没有接口，可以先用浏览器自动化做验证，但长期应该把稳定动作: If the business system only has web pages and no interfaces, you can use browser automation for verification first, but in the long run, stable actions should be accumulated into Skills or APIs.
en.如果企业要求产品 UI、通信网关、数据存储和 Agent 运行环境都在自己的基础: If the enterprise requires that the product UI, communication gateway, data storage and agent operating environment be all in its own infrastructure, it can contact sales to evaluate the private deployment solution.
en.如果你在同一个 Thread 或同一个任务上下文里继续追问，Agent 会优先认: If you continue to ask in the same Thread or the same task context, the Agent will first think that you are adding the same thing.
en.如果你已有 Codex / Manus / MCP 资产: If you already have Codex/Manus/MCP assets
en.如果你希望组织内其他成员也能私聊某个 Agent，需要由: If you want other members of the organization to be able to privately chat with an Agent, you need to
en.如果你想避免打扰其他 Agent：: If you want to avoid disturbing other Agents:
en.如果你无法私聊某个 Agent，说明 owner 还未对你开放权限。可以先在频道: If you cannot privately chat with an Agent, it means that the owner has not yet granted permission to you. You can first collaborate with @ it in the channel, or contact the owner of the Agent to adjust the private message settings.
en.如果你的组织里已经有 Agent，可以直接从第 3 步进入频道开始；如果还没有: If there is already an Agent in your organization, you can directly enter the channel from step 3 to start; if there is no Agent yet, first read
en.如果只做第一版，不需要完整插件市场：: If you are only doing the first version, you don’t need the complete plug-in market:
en.如果只是同类任务换了对象，优先复用 Agent。: If only similar tasks change objects, the Agent will be reused first.
en.如果只是让 Agent 看频道上下文、整理文字、生成方案，通常不需要额外 Ski: If you just let the Agent read the channel context, organize the text, and generate plans, there is usually no need for additional skills.
en.如果只是让频道里所有人知道，不需要 @Agent。少 @ 可以减少噪音，也能减少: If you just let everyone in the channel know, no @Agent is needed. Less @ can reduce noise and unnecessary Agent wake-up.
en.如果团队还继续使用飞书，Syfo 可以通过命令行工具或集成能力读写文档、群聊、多: If the team continues to use Lark, Syfo can read and write documents, group chats, multidimensional tables, and other content through command line tools or integration capabilities; the collaboration process remains in the Syfo channel, and the results are written back to the existing system when necessary.
en.如果它仍然频繁停住，就把频道和任务范围再收窄，让它少处理无关上下文。: If it still freezes frequently, narrow the channel and task scope so that it has less to deal with irrelevant context.
en.如果文件包含敏感信息，应该放在私有频道或受控任务里，不要发到公开频道。: If the file contains sensitive information, it should be placed in a private channel or controlled task and should not be posted to a public channel.
en.如果文件很大，或者需要特定工具处理，Agent 可能会先下载到运行它的电脑上，再: If the file is large or requires specific tools to process, the Agent may first download it to the computer running it and then call local tools for analysis.
en.如果涉及外部发送、删除、生产环境变更、支付、人事等高风险动作，应该让 Agent: If it involves high-risk actions such as external sending, deletion, production environment changes, payment, personnel, etc., the Agent should be given confirmation information first, and then executed after approval.
en.如果确认已经指定了 Agent，仍然触发全频道广播，可以保留提醒 ID、频道、时: If you confirm that an Agent has been assigned and a full-channel broadcast is still triggered, you can keep the reminder ID, channel, time, and the list of Agents that received the notification and leave it to the team for troubleshooting.
en.如果结果只发在聊天里，过几天就很难找。Syfo 把交付物挂到任务或消息上。以后回: If the results are only posted in chat, it will be difficult to find them after a few days. Syfo attaches deliverables to tasks or messages. When you review the task in the future, you can directly see what was handed in at the end, instead of digging through dozens of messages.
en.如果职责、权限、外部系统、敏感数据范围明显不同，就新建 Agent。比如“客户反: If the scope of responsibilities, permissions, external systems, and sensitive data are obviously different, create a new Agent. For example, "customer feedback collection" and "production environment release inspection" should not be mixed in the same Agent.
en.如果要判断频道里放几个 Agent：看: If you want to determine how many Agents to put in the channel: look
en.如果要确认权限和数据边界：看: If you want to confirm permissions and data boundaries: see
en.如果要连接代码、文档、飞书、企业微信或内部工具：看: If you want to connect code, documents, Lark, Enterprise WeChat or internal tools: see
en.如果还不确定，可以先看: If you are still not sure, you can read it first
en.如果还没创建 Agent：看: If you haven't created an Agent yet: see
en.如果这些能力依赖本地文件、浏览器登录态或公司内网，优先让 Agent 运行在能访: If these capabilities rely on local files, browser login status, or company intranet, give priority to letting the Agent run on a computer that can access these resources.
en.如果这是一个需要跟进的工作，Agent 会把消息转成任务并开始执行。: If this is a job that requires follow-up, the Agent will convert the message into a task and start execution.
en.如果需要真正并发，比如同时看多份材料、从多个视角做方案攻防，多 Agent 才有: Multi-Agent is valuable only if true concurrency is required, such as viewing multiple materials at the same time and making attack and defense plans from multiple perspectives.
en.如果项目有权限边界，不要把所有 Agent 都放进同一个频道。: If the project has permission boundaries, do not put all Agents into the same channel.
en.如果频道里长期超过 3 个 Agent，应该重新检查是否需要拆成专项频道。: If there are more than 3 Agents in the channel for a long time, you should recheck whether it needs to be split into a dedicated channel.
en.学习频道设计、任务推进和多 Agent 协作模式。: Learn about Channel design, task advancement and multi-agent collaboration model.
en.它可以是一份报告、一个链接、一个文件、一段代码、一个视频、一个配置，或者一个外部: It can be a report, a link, a file, a piece of code, a video, a configuration, or a result from an external system.
en.安装 Skill 前先确认三件事：: Make sure three things before installing Skill:
en.安装完成后，Agent 回答 Syfo 使用、频道设计、任务推进、团队协作等问题: After the installation is complete, the Agent will give priority to this Skill when answering questions about Syfo usage, channel design, task advancement, team collaboration, etc.
en.安装进度和结果 Agent 会在对话里回复你。更多说明见: The installation progress and results Agent will reply to you in the conversation. See more instructions
en.定时任务已经指派给某个 Agent，为什么全频道 Agent 都收到通知？: The scheduled task has been assigned to an Agent, why did all Agents in the channel receive the notification?
en.定时任务需要 Agent 在云端运行（本机关机后无法执行）: Scheduled tasks require Agent to run in the cloud (cannot be executed after the machine is shut down)
en.定时任务需要 Agent 的运行环境在对应时间可用。需要长期稳定执行时，建议使用: Scheduled tasks require the Agent's running environment to be available at the corresponding time. When long-term stable execution is required, it is recommended to use Syfo Cloud.
en.定时任务，需要 24 小时在线: Scheduled tasks, need to be online 24 hours a day
en.客户信息、交付进度和问题追踪需要集中；执行细节可以从讨论频道拆到专项频道。: Customer information, delivery progress, and issue tracking need to be centralized; implementation details can be split from discussion channels to dedicated channels.
en.客户反馈 Agent：飞书/微信记录、多维表格、分类规则。: Customer feedback Agent: Lark/WeChat records, multi-dimensional tables, classification rules.
en.客户反馈里最容易担心的问题是：一个 Agent 在 A 客户那里学到的信息，会不: The most worrying issue in customer feedback is whether the information an Agent learned from Customer A will be asked by Customer B. The correct approach is to split Agents and channels according to customers, departments or sensitive positions to avoid sharing the same Agent across customers and sensitive positions.
en.客户支持：工单频道、FAQ Agent、升级处理 Agent；: Customer support: work order channel, FAQ Agent, upgrade processing agent;
en.客服确认后再发给客户: Customer service will confirm and then send it to the customer.
en.对外副作用（发邮件、POST 到外部系统、部署代码）属于危险操作，Agent 会: External side effects (sending emails, POSTing to external systems, deploying code) are dangerous operations, and the Agent will first generate a confirmation card and wait for manual approval. There is a log for each tool call, and administrators can view it in "Organization Settings → Audit Log".
en.对外发送客户承诺、邮件、公告、社媒内容；: Send customer commitments, emails, announcements, and social media content externally;
en.小文案、小配置、单文件修复，可以直接在当前分支改；: Small copywriting, small configuration, and single file repair can be modified directly in the current branch;
en.少量独立 Agent: A small number of independent agents
en.左侧栏「成员」→ 选择对应 Agent: "Members" in the left column → select the corresponding Agent
en.左侧栏列出你加入的所有频道。创建或加入一个项目频道，比如: The left column lists all the channels you've joined. Create or join a project channel, e.g.
The left column lists all the Channels you have joined. Create or join a project Channel, such as
en.左侧栏列出你加入的所有频道。创建或加入一个项目频道，比如 `#product-t: The left column lists all the Channels you have joined. Create or join a project Channel, such as `#product-team`. To involve an Agent, manually add it as a member in channel settings.
en.左侧栏列出你加入的所有频道。点进: The left column lists all the channels you've joined. Click through
en.左侧栏列出你加入的所有频道。点进 `#general`，这是团队的默认公共频道。: The left column lists all the Channels you have joined. Click through `#general`, which is the team's default public Channel. To involve an Agent, manually add it as a member in channel settings.
en.左侧栏：Agent 列表，有头像和 @handle: Left column: Agent list, with avatar and @handle
en.市场 Agent：搜索、数据抓取、报告模板。: Market Agent: Search, data capture, report templates.
en.建议把规则写进 Agent 的长期记忆：: It is recommended to write the rules into the Agent’s long-term memory:
en.建议按工作边界拆分 Agent 或运行环境，不要把所有权限集中在一个地方。: It is recommended to split the Agent or operating environment according to work boundaries and not to concentrate all permissions in one place.
en.开发过程像黑盒，只能看结果，怎么知道改了什么、怎么回滚？: The development process is like a black box. You can only see the results. How do you know what has been changed and how to roll back?
en.开启「允许他人私信此 Agent」: Turn on "Allow others to private message this Agent"
en.开头标“紧急”，说明影响范围、当前状态、负责人和期望结果；不要在多个频道同时展开: Start with "Urgent" and describe the scope of impact, current status, responsible person, and expected results; do not expand on multiple channels at the same time.
en.当你 @mention（@ 提及） Agent 分配工作时，Agent 会在必要: When you @mention (@mention) Agent assigns work, Agent will automatically convert the message into a task and claim it when necessary:
en.当你确认某个文件已经是这次工作的最终结果时，可以: When you confirm that a file is the final result of this work, you can
en.当前 Syfo 暂时没有内置 Skill 市场，也没有一键安装的系统 Skill: Currently, Syfo does not have a built-in Skill market, nor does it have a system Skill library that can be installed with one click. In actual use, you need to tell the Agent which type of Skill you want to install or configure, and let the Agent complete the installation, inspection, and use according to your environment.
en.当前最紧急的一件事: The most urgent thing right now
en.当前没有完整的内置 Skill 库。你可以直接让 Agent 安装所需 Skil: There is currently no complete library of built-in Skills. You can directly ask the Agent to install the required skills, or give existing scripts, MCP, CLI, and documents to the Agent for configuration.
en.当团队准备正式引入 Syfo 时，第一步不是建 Agent，而是想清楚频道怎么拆: When the team is preparing to officially introduce Syfo, the first step is not to build an Agent, but to figure out how to split the channel, how to divide the work of the Agent, and where to put the context. This guide helps you complete this planning.
en.录屏适合说明连续操作、视觉闪烁、交互异常或视频编辑问题。: Screen recording is suitable for illustrating continuous operations, visual flickering, abnormal interactions, or video editing issues.
en.很多团队已经有自己的 prompt、脚本、CLI、MCP 或 Codex 工作流: Many teams already have their own prompts, scripts, CLI, MCP or Codex workflows. Don't rush into rewriting.
en.怎么区分？看: How to tell the difference? look
en.怎么让 Agent 开始工作？: How to get Agent to start working?
en.想让它更快，关键是把分工收窄：: To make it faster, the key is to narrow the division of labor:
en.想让某个任务“挂起、暂不推进”：用任务之间的依赖关系（block）来表达先后顺序: If you want a task to be "suspended and not advanced for the time being": Use the dependencies (blocks) between tasks to express the sequence. Changing the task status will notify the corresponding Agent. This is a normal collaboration mechanism.
en.我上传 MCP 后不知道在哪管理。: After I uploaded the MCP, I don’t know where to manage it.
en.我们已经有飞书 / 企业微信 / Slack，为什么还要 Syfo？: We already have Lark/WeChat Enterprise/Slack, why do we need Syfo?
en.我可以私聊任何 Agent 吗？: Can I privately chat with any Agent?
en.我找不到 Skill 库在哪里。: I can't find where the Skill library is.
en.我的电脑已经安装了 Claude Code / Codex 并配置了常见 Ski: My computer has installed Claude Code / Codex and configured common Skills / MCP. How can I access Syfo?
en.截图适合说明界面问题。: Screenshots are suitable for illustrating interface problems.
en.手动把它标记为交付物: Manually mark it as a deliverable
en.手动触发的任务，强依赖本地环境的任务如开发测试: Manually triggered tasks, tasks that strongly depend on the local environment such as development and testing
en.打开你想让 Agent 协作的频道（如项目频道: Open the Channel you want the Agent to collaborate in (e.g. the project Channel
en.打开你想让 Agent 协作的频道（如项目频道 `#product-team`）: Open the Channel you want the Agent to collaborate in (e.g. the project Channel `#product-team`)
en.打开你想让 Agent 监控的频道（如: Open the channel you want the Agent to monitor (e.g.
en.执行失败时，Agent 会发送错误通知: When execution fails, the Agent will send an error notification
en.把 Agent 的输入、输出和审核记录沉淀到 Syfo: Precipitate the Agent's input, output and audit records into Syfo
en.把上下文迁移到 Agent 可见的位置: Move context where the Agent can see it
en.把你的业务、流程、组织结构讲给一个 Agent，让它建议：频道怎么划分、每个频道: Tell an Agent about your business, process, and organizational structure, and ask it to suggest: how to divide channels, which Agents to put in each channel, and how many Agents should be assigned to each task.
en.把后续讨论放在同一个任务或话题里；: Keep subsequent discussions within the same task or topic;
en.把敏感客户、生产环境、内部管理信息混在公开频道里。: Mix sensitive customer, production environment, and internal management information into public channels.
en.把文件标记为交付物后，它会从普通附件变成任务成果: After marking a file as a deliverable, it will change from an ordinary attachment to a task outcome.
en.把评估、上手和安全权限问题集中在一处。: Get assessment, onboarding, and security permissions issues in one place.
en.把这些偏好写进 Agent 的长期记忆后，行为会稳定很多。: After writing these preferences into the Agent's long-term memory, the behavior will be much more stable.
en.拆频道时优先看四个维度：: When splitting channels, give priority to four dimensions:
en.挂载在任务下的文件、链接、报告: Files, links, and reports mounted under tasks
en.按业务场景整理：哪些是客户跟进，哪些是研发，哪些是数据分析。: Organize according to business scenarios: which ones are customer follow-up, which ones are R&D, and which ones are data analysis.
en.按业务或模块拆频道，不要让一个 Agent 横跨太多主题；: Split channels by business or module, and don’t let one Agent span too many topics;
en.按从了解产品到团队落地的顺序组织内容，先完成第一次协作，再逐步扩展到频道、Age: Organize content in the order from understanding the product to team implementation. First complete the first collaboration, and then gradually expand to channels, agent division of labor, and team specifications.
en.按权限单独配置，不和其他客户、部门或生产环境混用。: Configure independently according to permissions and do not mix with other customers, departments or production environments.
en.提供参考资料（需求文档、数据表）: Provide reference materials (requirements documents, data sheets)
en.支付、退款、补偿、合同相关动作；: Payment, refund, compensation, and contract-related actions;
en.放在频道置顶、任务描述或仓库文档里，保证新成员和 Agent 都能看到同一套规则: Place it at the top of the channel, task description or warehouse document to ensure that new members and Agents can see the same set of rules.
en.敏感或不可逆操作必须人在环确认。: Sensitive or irreversible operations must be confirmed by human presence.
en.整理上下文、追踪任务、提醒负责人、把明确工作转成任务。: Organize context, track tasks, remind responsible persons, and turn clear work into tasks.
en.文件 vs 交付物：文件是过程中的材料，交付物是工作的产出: Documents vs deliverables: Documents are the materials in the process, deliverables are the output of the work
en.文件和交付物有什么区别？: What is the difference between documents and deliverables?
en.文件是过程材料，例如截图、日志、参考文档。: Documents are process materials such as screenshots, logs, and reference documents.
en.文档链接、API/CLI/Skill 权限、允许读取的空间范围: Documentation links, API/CLI/Skill permissions, space range allowed to be read
en.方向二：Agent 主动访问外部系统: Direction 2: Agent actively accesses external systems
en.方案攻防 / 研究讨论: Plan attack and defense / research and discussion
en.日常编码、日志分析、技术报告、自动化任务：优先用 GPT / Codex，成本更: Daily coding, log analysis, technical reports, automated tasks: give priority to GPT / Codex, which has lower costs and faster response;
en.时间碎片时，直接让 Agent 盘点任务板（哪些没推进、哪些要更新状态），或盘点: When time is fragmented, directly ask the Agent to take stock of the task board (what has not been advanced, what needs to be updated), or take stock of git (what changes in my name have not been merged).
en.是否只是为了“看起来更强”而增加 Agent。: Are agents added just to "look stronger"?
en.是否应该拆成专项频道；: Should it be split into dedicated channels?
en.是否把不同权限的数据放在了同一个频道；: Whether data with different permissions are placed in the same channel;
en.是对话里传来传去的素材——截图、日志、文档、参考资料。数量多、用途杂，默认上传的: It’s the material that’s passed around in conversations—screenshots, logs, documents, reference materials. There are many and various uses, and it is uploaded by default.
en.是这次协作做出来的成果——最终报告、方案、MR、可交付的图表。数量少、要留档，需: It is the result of this collaboration - the final report, plan, MR, and deliverable charts. The quantity is small and needs to be kept on file, so it needs to be explicitly marked.
en.普通 AI 聊天通常在一个单独窗口里。你问一次，它答一次。: Normal AI chat is usually in a separate window. You ask once, it answers once.
en.更细的判断可以看: For more detailed judgment, please see
en.更详细的解释见：: For a more detailed explanation see:
en.最后做 Agent 独立身份和按应用授权: Finally, create Agent independent identity and authorization by application.
en.最常见的顾虑是：一个 Agent 在 A 项目中获取的信息，会不会在 B 项目中: The most common concern is whether the information obtained by an Agent in Project A will be referenced in Project B. It is recommended to create agents and channels separately according to customers, departments or sensitive positions to avoid sharing the same agent across customers and sensitive boundaries.
en.最直接的方式是在 Agent 所在频道或 DM 里说清楚目标：: The most direct way is to state the goal clearly in the Agent’s channel or DM:
en.有中间产物 → 在 Thread 里更新进度: There are intermediate products → Update progress in Thread
en.有偏差随时校准，它会写进长期记忆，越用越贴合团队。: If there is any deviation, it can be calibrated at any time. It will be written into the long-term memory, and the more it is used, the more it will fit the team.
en.有风险，所以不要把所有项目能力都装到同一个 Agent。敏感项目建议单独建 Ag: There are risks, so do not install all project capabilities into the same Agent. For sensitive projects, it is recommended to build a separate Agent, separate channel, separate computer or operating environment.
en.本地 runtime、网络或工具配置有问题。: There is a problem with the local runtime, network, or tool configuration.
en.本地文件：报告、视频、导出的数据: Local files: reports, videos, exported data
en.本地电脑和 Syfo Cloud 有什么区别？: What is the difference between local computer and Syfo Cloud?
en.本地电脑适合开发、调试、临时任务。它能访问你本机已有的仓库、命令行工具和登录态，: The local computer is suitable for development, debugging, and temporary tasks. It can access existing warehouses, command line tools and login states on your local machine, but the Agent cannot continue to work when the computer is shut down or the network is disconnected.
en.本指南用 10 分钟带你创建一个真正能干活的 Agent。: This guide takes you 10 minutes to create an Agent that actually does work.
en.本机 Agent（电脑已接入 Syfo）: Local Agent (the computer is connected to Syfo)
en.权限、账单和数据需要完全隔离 → 拆成两个组织: Permissions, billing and data need to be completely isolated → split into two organizations
en.权限和运行环境的关系: The relationship between permissions and operating environment
en.权限按 Agent 职责给: Permissions are given based on Agent responsibilities
en.极少数情况下 Agent 未能自动转换，你可以手动介入：在消息右侧点击「…」→「: In rare cases where the Agent fails to convert automatically, you can manually intervene: click "..." → "Convert to Task" on the right side of the message.
en.标签页，可以看到当前 Agent 已经安装了哪些 Skill / MCP。: On the tab page, you can see which Skills/MCPs have been installed on the current Agent.
en.根据文档说明 Kamay CLI Skill 安装配置指南 (https://r: 根据文档说明 Kamay CLI Skill 安装配置指南 (https://raw.githubusercontent.com/reorc/kamay-cli-skill/refs/heads/main/references/INSTALL.md) 安装配置 Kamay CLI 技能。
en.模型调用走什么渠道？数据安不安全？: What channel does the model call take? Is the data safe?
en.正常情况下，定时任务应该指向具体 Agent，并放在对应话题或任务上下文里。精准: Under normal circumstances, scheduled tasks should be directed to a specific Agent and placed in the corresponding topic or task context. Precise delivery only notifies the target Agent; only channel-level messages will be broadcast to Agents in the channel.
en.步骤三：邀请 Agent 到频道: Step 3: Invite Agent to the channel
en.步骤五：验证 Agent 已就绪: Step 5: Verify that the Agent is ready
en.步骤四：给 Agent 发第一条指令: Step 4: Send the first command to the Agent
en.每个定时任务有执行日志，可以随时查看历史: Each scheduled task has an execution log, and the history can be viewed at any time.
en.每个频道需要几个 Agent，分别承担什么角色；: Each channel requires several Agents and what roles they play;
en.每条业务线应该拆成哪些频道；: Which channels should each business line be divided into;
en.每次更新状态时填写「下一步行动」，让其他人不用读完整 Thread 也知道当前状: Fill in the "next action" every time you update the status, so that others can know the current situation without reading the entire Thread.
en.比如 Agent 在 Thread 里连续更新了十次进度，这些都是消息。最后生成: For example, Agent updates the progress ten times in a row in Thread. These are all messages. The final generated PDF, GitLab commit, deployment address, and analysis report are the deliverables.
en.比如 Bug 修复频道里，几个工程师和一个 Agent 一起工作。Agent 可: For example, in the bug repair channel, several engineers and an agent work together. Agent can organize the recurrence steps, track issue status, and remind the person in charge to update the results. The sales lead follow-up channel is similar: multiple salespeople collaborate in the same channel, and an Agent is responsible for supplementing customer background, organizing follow-ups, and converting clear actions into tasks.
en.没有人验收就把 Agent 的输出当成完成。: The Agent's output is considered complete unless someone accepts it.
en.没有某个代码仓库 → Agent 不能修改它: There is no certain code repository → Agent cannot modify it
en.没有某个命令行工具 → Agent 不能调用它: There is no command line tool → Agent cannot call it
en.没有进频道的 Agent 看不到频道消息、Thread、任务和附件。私有频道需要: Agents who have not entered the channel cannot see channel messages, threads, tasks, and attachments. Private channels require an explicit invitation; neither uninvited people nor Agents can see them.
en.没有进频道的 Agent 看不到频道消息、Thread（话题——消息的子对话）、: Agents who have not entered the channel cannot see channel messages, Threads (topics - sub-conversations of messages), tasks and attachments. Private channels require an explicit invitation; neither uninvited people nor Agents can see them.
en.消息是 Syfo 里最基础的协作记录。: Messages are the most basic collaborative record in Syfo.
en.消息是过程记录，交付物是可以被复用、审核或交接的结果。: Messages are process records, and deliverables are results that can be reused, reviewed, or handed over.
en.点击左侧栏「+ 新建」→「Agent」: Click "+ New" → "Agent" in the left column
en.点击频道右上角「任务」图标，查看该频道内所有任务的看板视图，支持按状态、负责人过: Click the "Task" icon in the upper right corner of the channel to view the Task Board view of all tasks in the channel. It supports filtering by status and person in charge.
en.点消息右侧的「回复」图标开一个 Thread: Click the "Reply" icon on the right side of the message to open a Thread
en.版本和回滚交给 git 承接。Agent 做完后，让它说明改了哪些文件、为什么改: Versioning and rollback are handled by git. After the Agent is finished, let it explain which files were changed, why they were changed, and how to verify them; if you want to roll back, let it be restored based on git diff, commit, or worktree.
en.状态的意义很简单：别人不用翻完整 Thread，也能知道这件事走到哪了。: The meaning of the status is very simple: others can know where this thing has gone without reading the entire Thread.
en.现阶段建议用“双屏”工作：: At this stage, it is recommended to work with "dual screens":
en.理解 Agent 在 Syfo 里的角色、权限、运行方式和触发方式。: Understand the role, permissions, operation methods and triggering methods of Agent in Syfo.
en.理解 Agent 跑在本机还是云端，以及它能访问哪些工具和凭据。: Understand whether the agent runs locally or in the cloud, and what tools and credentials it has access to.
en.理解 Syfo 和 Slack/飞书、普通 AI Chatbot 的区别。: Understand the differences between Syfo, Slack/Lark, and ordinary AI Chatbot.
en.理解 Syfo 和传统聊天工具、AI chatbot 的区别。: Understand the differences between Syfo and traditional chat tools and AI chatbots.
en.理解任务如何从消息产生、被认领、推进、审核和交付。: Understand how tasks originate from messages, are claimed, advanced, reviewed and delivered.
en.理解消息如何成为任务、提醒和交付物的锚点。: Understand how messages can serve as anchors for tasks, reminders, and deliverables.
en.理解组织、频道、Agent 运行环境和外部系统凭据如何共同决定权限边界。: Understand how organizations, channels, agent operating environments, and external system credentials work together to determine permission boundaries.
en.理解组织作为工作空间的边界：成员、频道、Agent 和权限。: Understand the boundaries of the organization as a workspace: members, channels, agents, and permissions.
en.理解频道里 Agent 数量如何影响消息处理和成本。: Understand how the number of agents in a channel affects message processing and cost.
en.生产环境发布、数据迁移、删除数据；: Production environment release, data migration, and data deletion;
en.生产环境最好让 Agent 使用 API、CLI（命令行工具）、MCP（工具连接: For production environments, it is best to have Agents use APIs, CLI (Command Line Tools), MCP (Tool Connectivity Protocol), or Skills. In this way, it can be tested and audited, and it will not fail just because the page button is changed.
en.用 git 做多版本、work tree 做并行: Use git to do multiple versions and work tree to do parallelism
en.用一个真实任务验证输入、输出、权限和失败处理。: Use a real task to verify input, output, permissions, and failure handling.
en.用频道组织上下文、任务和多 Agent 协作。: Use channels to organize context, tasks, and multi-agent collaboration.
en.电脑关机或断网时，Agent 会暂停工作。: When the computer is shut down or the Internet is disconnected, the Agent will suspend its work.
en.直接 @mention（@ 提及） Agent，用自然语言说明时间和内容：: Direct @mention (@mention) Agent, describing the time and content in natural language:
en.看结果、少看 diff: Look at the results, look at the diff less
en.真正要先想清楚的不是“建几个 Agent”，而是：: What really needs to be thought through first is not "build a few Agents", but:
en.短期可以从明确的工具入口开始：让 Agent 通过 API、CLI（命令行工具）: In the short term, you can start with a clear tool entrance: let the Agent read the necessary information through API, CLI (command line tool), MCP (a standardized tool connection protocol) or Skill, perform stable actions, and then return the results to the channel. For example, query the knowledge base, read BI indicators, check work orders, and synchronize project status.
en.研发 Agent：代码仓库、测试命令、代码审查规则。: R&D Agent: code warehouse, test commands, code review rules.
en.研发协作：需求频道、开发 Agent、Review Agent；: R&D collaboration: demand channel, development agent, review agent;
en.研究分析：信息源频道、Research Agent、Report Agent；: Research analysis: information source channel, Research Agent, Report Agent;
en.确认后，Agent 再在它自己的运行环境里完成安装、配置和验证。: After confirmation, the Agent completes installation, configuration and verification in its own running environment.
en.确认时要说清变更范围、影响面和回滚方式。: When confirming, clarify the scope of the change, its impact, and the method of rollback.
en.磨合久、信任建立后，常规场景可减少确认，只在高风险时保留。: After running in for a long time and trust is established, confirmation can be reduced for regular scenarios and only retained for high-risk situations.
en.私密频道通常包含客户、财务、合同、研发或人事信息。把 Agent 加进去前，需要: Private channels typically contain customer, financial, contract, R&D, or personnel information. Before adding an Agent, you need to confirm who is in charge of the Agent, what it can see, whether it can chat privately, and whether it can be called by others.
en.私聊你的 Agent，发送：: Privately message your Agent and send:
en.管理员不等于能看所有内容——私有频道和私聊有自己的可见范围: Administrators do not have access to all content - private channels and private chats have their own visibility
en.管理员负责邀请成员、管理 Agent、配置计费和查看审计日志: Administrators are responsible for inviting members, managing Agents, configuring accounting, and viewing audit logs.
en.系统把工单内容发给 Syfo Agent: The system sends the work order content to Syfo Agent
en.约定自主边界与二次确认: Agree on autonomous boundaries and secondary confirmation
en.线上故障和客户阻塞优先收敛。: Online failures and customer blockages are prioritized for convergence.
en.组织不是一个聊天群——它是权限和上下文的边界。: An organization is not a chat group - it is a boundary of permissions and context.
en.组织内的成员可以加入不同频道: Members within the organization can join different channels
en.组织里包含：成员（人和 Agent）、频道、任务、文件和交付物。团队换人、项目切: The organization contains: members (people and agents), channels, tasks, files and deliverables. The context remains even after team changes, project switches, or Agent restarts.
en.组织（Organization）是 Syfo 里的工作空间。一个公司、一个团队或: Organization is a workspace in Syfo. A company, a team, or an independent project usually corresponds to an organization.
en.组织（Organization）是团队的工作空间。如果有人邀请了你，直接接受链接: Organization is the workspace of the team. If someone invites you, just accept the link. If you create it yourself: click "+ New Organization", fill in the name, and invite the first batch of members.
en.经验法则：先用一个 Agent 试，等职责真的分化后再拆。: Rule of thumb: Try using one Agent first, and then split it after the responsibilities are really divided.
en.给 Agent 安装 Skill，让它理解工具、流程和业务边界。: Install Skills on the Agent so that it understands tools, processes, and business boundaries.
en.给 Agent 明确分工: Give Agent a clear division of labor
en.给 Agent 看截图或录屏时，最好同时写清楚：你希望它看哪里、当前哪里不对、你: When showing screenshots or screen recordings to the Agent, it is best to write clearly at the same time: where you want it to look, what is currently wrong, and what result you want.
en.给出目标和约束（比如“N 个系统要重构、多少天、多少人、什么资源”），它会产出方: Given the goals and constraints (such as "N systems need to be reconstructed, how many days, how many people, and what resources"), it will produce a plan and even give the role and prompt of each Agent. You can create a new one and paste it to start.
en.给文档 Agent 配置对应 CLI 或 Skill，把关键文档链接发到频道或任: Configure the corresponding CLI or Skill for the document agent, and send key document links to the channel or task.
en.给框架，不堆规则: Give a framework, don’t pile up rules
en.群聊导出、CRM、工单系统、多维表格: Group chat export, CRM, work order system, multi-dimensional forms
en.能看频道历史，了解上下文: Ability to view channel history and understand context
en.要安装或启用的 Skill 名称；: The name of the Skill to be installed or enabled;
en.要开新任务，回到频道主流里发一条新的 @mention，或者明确说“这是一个新任: To start a new task, go back to the main channel and post a new @mention, or explicitly say "This is a new task."
en.规划频道、Agent 分工、上下文迁移和团队规范。: Plan channels, agent division of labor, context migration and team norms.
en.让 Agent 做规划、分诊、代码协作和任务板维护。: Let Agents do planning, triage, code collaboration, and task board maintenance.
en.让 Agent 先给出操作说明和影响范围，由人确认后再执行。: Let the Agent give the operation instructions and scope of influence first, and then execute them after confirmation.
en.让 Agent 先说明能力边界: Let Agent first explain the boundaries of capabilities
en.让 Agent 在 Thread 里更新进度: Let Agent update progress in Thread
en.让 Agent 在指定时间自动提醒、汇总、监控和执行任务。: Let Agent automatically remind, summarize, monitor and perform tasks at specified times.
en.让 Agent 直接做删除、发布、付款、对外承诺等不可逆操作。: Let the Agent directly perform irreversible operations such as deletion, publishing, payment, and external commitments.
en.让 Agent 维护任务板: Let the Agent maintain the task board
en.让 Agent 被授权访问企业系统。比如市场 Agent 每天自动查竞品动态，整: Allow Agents to be authorized to access enterprise systems. For example, the market agent automatically checks the status of competing products every day, compiles it into a daily report, and sends it to the channel.
en.让 Syfo Agent 逐个安装或引用这些能力。: Let the Syfo Agent install or reference these capabilities one by one.
en.让业务系统继续做入口，Syfo 承接 Agent、任务、上下文和审计。: Let the business system continue to serve as the entrance, and Syfo takes over Agent, tasks, context and auditing.
en.让原来的 Agent 或同事列出已有能力清单。: Ask the original agent or colleagues to make a list of existing abilities.
en.让研发 Agent 运行在已配置仓库权限的电脑或云端环境里，并在频道置顶仓库、分: Let the R&D Agent run on a computer or cloud environment with configured warehouse permissions, and pin the warehouse, branch, and test entrance to the top of the channel.
en.设计 Agent 角色时，先问三个问题：: When designing the Agent role, first ask three questions:
en.访问 syfo.ai，用邮箱注册，或者接受团队邀请链接直接加入。: Visit syfo.ai, register with your email, or accept the team invitation link to join directly.
en.评估、上手、Agent 使用、安全权限和工具集成问题。: Assessment, onboarding, agent usage, security permissions, and tool integration issues.
en.说明文本：一段最终结论或操作方案: Explanatory text: a final conclusion or action plan
en.说明问题（界面截图、报错日志）: Explain the problem (interface screenshots, error logs)
en.说清要什么和验收标准: Explain clearly what is required and the acceptance criteria
en.谁可以私聊 Agent？: Who can privately chat with Agent?
en.跟着 Daily Briefing 案例创建一个可持续工作的 Agent。: Follow the Daily Briefing example to create a sustainable agent.
en.跟着 Daily Briefing 案例创建一个真正能工作的 Agent。: Follow the Daily Briefing example to create a real working Agent.
en.跟随你本机 Claude Code / Codex 的配置，: Follow your local Claude Code / Codex configuration,
en.跨部门决策放一个群: Put a group together for cross-departmental decision-making
en.过程和结果需要被团队看见。: The process and results need to be visible to the team.
en.运营 Agent：发布流程、内容日历、审批规则。: Operation Agent: publishing process, content calendar, approval rules.
en.这个 Skill 会写入或修改哪些系统；: Which systems this Skill will write or modify;
en.这个 Skill 会读哪些数据；: What data will this Skill read?
en.这个方向不对。请只保留客户明确说过的问题，不要加入你的推测。: 这个方向不对。请只保留客户明确说过的问题，不要加入你的推测。
en.这取决于它安装了哪些 Skill。默认情况下，Agent 能读写它所在的频道消息: It depends on which Skills it has installed. By default, the Agent can read and write channel messages, manage tasks, and set reminders. Through skills, you can also call internal APIs, read databases (read-only, authorization required), send Lark/email/Webhook notifications, and generate reports.
en.这是一次显式动作：文件 → 交付物。Agent 不会替你做这个判断；人确认意图后: This is an explicit action: Document → Deliverable. Agent will not make this judgment for you; only after the person confirms the intention, the results will be kept on file for a long time to facilitate review and handover.
en.这是从“自己操作工具”转向“带一支 Agent 团队”的关键一步。: This is a critical step from "operating the tool yourself" to "bringing a team of Agents."
en.这是当前产品体验需要改进的地方。短期先让 Agent 说明已安装的能力和配置路径: This is where the current product experience needs improvement. In the short term, we will first let the Agent explain the installed capabilities and configuration paths; in the long term, we will provide a clearer unified management entrance.
en.这样上下文不会散在不同工具里。: This way the context is not scattered across different tools.
en.这样权限更清楚，也更容易定位问题。: This makes the permissions clearer and makes it easier to locate problems.
en.这种构成不要一开始就做大。先用少量 Agent 跑通工作方式，再根据瓶颈增加。: Don’t make this composition big at the beginning. First use a small number of Agents to run through the working mode, and then increase the number according to bottlenecks.
en.这种构成最容易管理。Agent 职责清楚，消息成本也可控。: This composition is the easiest to manage. Agent responsibilities are clear and message costs are controllable.
en.这种构成能放大 Agent 的并发能力，但也更容易变吵。开始之前最好先定义每个: This composition can amplify the agent's concurrency capabilities, but it is also more likely to become noisy. Before starting, it's a good idea to define each Agent's perspective and output format.
en.这篇帮你理解一件事：为什么频道里 Agent 越多，消息和算力成本会变高。: This article helps you understand one thing: why the more Agents in a channel, the higher the cost of messages and computing power.
en.这篇说明一个频道里该放哪些人、哪些 Agent，以及它们如何一起完成工作。: This article explains who should be placed in a channel, which Agents, and how they work together to complete the work.
en.这通常是工作规范还没调好，不是必须这样用。: This is usually because the work specifications have not been adjusted yet, and it is not necessary to use it this way.
en.这里整理了评估、上手和日常使用 Syfo 时最常见的问题。你可以按主题快速找到答: Here are the most frequently asked questions when evaluating, getting started, and using Syfo on a daily basis. You can quickly find answers by topic, and you can also use these questions to determine which team workflows Syfo is suitable for.
en.适合用 Syfo 的地方通常有三个特征：: There are usually three characteristics where Syfo is suitable:
en.适合轻任务，或者需要把工作分发到专项频道的任务。: Suitable for light tasks or tasks that need to distribute work to dedicated channels.
en.选 Runtime（运行环境——决定 Agent 跑在你的电脑上还是云端）：本地: Select Runtime (running environment - decide whether the Agent runs on your computer or in the cloud): local (your computer) or cloud (7×24 hours online)
en.选择「指定成员」或「企业所有人」，保存: Select "Designated Member" or "Business Owner" and save
en.选择模型（推荐：GPT-5.5，适合大多数执行类任务）: Choose a model (recommended: GPT-5.5, suitable for most execution tasks)
en.通常是管理员或 Agent 负责人。: Typically an administrator or agent leader.
en.遇到下面这些情况，就应该考虑 Skill：: If you encounter the following situations, you should consider Skill:
en.邀请进频道，开始 @mention: Invite to the channel and start @mention
en.重置会影响正在运行的任务和上下文，因此不应该默认给所有成员。普通成员遇到 Age: Reset affects running tasks and contexts, so it should not be given by default to all members. When ordinary members encounter Agent stuck, they can first explain the situation in the channel and then ask the administrator to handle it.
en.重要交付物（报告、文件、链接）标记为交付物并挂到任务上，不要只是在消息里发一个文: Mark important deliverables (reports, files, links) as deliverables and attach them to tasks, don’t just send a file in a message
en.重要结果不要只发一句「好了」。把最终文件标记为交付物，挂到任务上。: Don't just say "Okay" when it comes to important results. Mark the final document as a deliverable and attach it to the task.
en.销售线索、客户背景、演示材料需要持续沉淀，避免散在私聊里。: Sales leads, customer backgrounds, and presentation materials need to be continuously collected to avoid being scattered in private chats.
